title: GPU-accelerated virtual drug screening with cuML and Agent Platform
summary: Google Cloud and NVIDIA demonstrate GPU-accelerated virtual drug screening using cuML and Agent Platform. The system predicts molecular binding likelihood (EGFR lung cancer targets) and achieves 20x-45x training speedups over CPU-based scikit-learn and pandas without code rewrites. The approach scales to trillion-molecule screening pipelines.
writeup: Google Cloud and NVIDIA demonstrate GPU-accelerated virtual drug screening built on cuML and Agent Platform. The system predicts molecular binding likelihood against EGFR lung cancer targets and reports 20x-45x training speedups over CPU-based scikit-learn and pandas, achieved without code rewrites. The demonstration uses cuDF for tabular data alongside cuML for modeling, and the approach scales toward trillion-molecule screening pipelines.
